description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed adult figure holding a child, both standing atop an ornate pedestal. The adult figure appears to be male, with short hair and a gentle expression, cradling the child in his left arm while the child looks outward. The pedestal is highly decorative, featuring intricate reliefs and four sturdy, curved legs that provide stability. The entire piece is rendered in a dark, metallic material, giving it a somber and dignified appearance. The surface shows subtle highlights and wear, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The overall form is vertical and slender, with the figures as the focal point and the base providing a sense of grandeur.
description: A dark metallic sculpture of a robed adult holding a child, standing on an ornate pedestal with intricate reliefs and curved legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the adult figure's face and the child held in the left arm, with the detailed pedestal fully visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of both figures and the depth of the pedestal's relief work.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the figures' robes and the symmetrical design of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the adult figure's profile and the child, with the pedestal's ornate side details.
attribute_subject_matter: robed adult figure holding a child
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the background is isolated and plain.
